name: chaingpt
description: The Web3 toolkit for Claude Code. AI-powered (ChainGPT chat / NFT / Solidity generator + auditor / crypto news / Solidity LLM) PLUS generic Web3: multi-chain wallet portfolios, token research (DexScreener), risk scanning (GoPlus + Honeypot), on-chain analytics (Etherscan v2), AI-enriched composed intel calls, AND a full MAINNET-first contract deployment lifecycle (compile / estimate / build-unsigned-tx / verify on Etherscan v2) with a mandatory audit gate. 45+ audited Solidity patterns + zero-credit mock server. Custody-free — user signs externally.
